title: Add Primbon Jawa Modern to learn
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Primbon Jawa Modern](https://jawidigital.my.id) to learn
- Aplikasi Primbon Jawa Modern yang menghadirkan kearifan lokal budaya Jawa dan perhitungan tradisional ke dalam platform digital yang praktis. (Mas Arif bisa tambahkan info di sini, misalnya kalau apli

Fixes #10703

gist.headline: Javanese Wisdom Goes Digital
gist.blurb: The greenhouse just got a touch of traditional Javanese culture! Primbon Jawa Modern brings ancient wisdom and calculations into a sleek digital platform.
gist.summary: Added 'Primbon Jawa Modern', a digital platform for traditional Javanese cultural wisdom and calculations, to the community apps showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and explore this modern take on traditional Javanese Primbon in the community greenhouse.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot interacting with traditional Javanese elements (like a digital scroll or mystical calculation board) inside the cozy greenhouse, blending ancient culture with digital tech.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny traditional patterned scarf, looking at a glowing digital scroll with ancient script inside a lush greenhouse. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
